# KPI Dashboard Specification

## Purpose
Define the KPIs, data sources, and visualization requirements for a project or portfolio
performance dashboard.

## Audience
Analytics Lead, PMO Lead, Product Owner, Executive Stakeholders.

## Inputs
- Success metrics (`docs/product/success-metrics.md`).
- Project performance data and baselines.

## Required Sections
- Dashboard objectives
- KPI definitions
- Data sources and refresh cadence
- Visualization requirements
- Access and governance

## 1. Dashboard Objectives
- **Primary decisions supported:**
- **Target audience:**
- **Reporting cadence:**

## 2. KPI Definitions
| KPI | Definition | Calculation | Target | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 3. Data Sources & Refresh
| KPI | Source System | Refresh Cadence | Data Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 4. Visualization Requirements
| KPI | Visualization | Filters | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 5. Access & Governance
- **Access roles:**
- **Approval process:**
- **Data quality checks:**

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] KPIs defined with calculations and targets.
- [ ] Data sources validated and owners assigned.
- [ ] Visualization requirements documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dashboard spec supports decision-making with clear KPIs.
- Governance and access requirements are approved.
